summary: Maria Lopez is an experienced, bilingual caregiver whose hands-on skills align well with the core duties of the role. Her candidacy is limited primarily by unconfirmed transportation, limited weekend and evening availability, and an expired CPR certification, all of which are addressable with follow-up.
strengths: About three years of relevant in-home caregiving experience assisting elderly clients with daily living activities
Directly relevant hands-on skills including bathing, dressing, meal preparation, and bed-to-wheelchair transfers
Bilingual in English and Spanish, a preferred qualification for the role
Confirmed daily experience with mobility transfers, including training with a gait belt
gaps: Transportation remains only partially confirmed, and the role requires a valid driver's license and reliable transportation
Stated weekday daytime availability conflicts with the required weekend and evening shifts, with only limited weekend availability offered
CPR and First Aid certification expired in 2024 and must be renewed before starting
TB test status is uncertain and would need to be confirmed or arranged
